name: pushout-spec
description: Quint formal model of the boxer pushout exchange protocol and crash-recovery layer

scripts.typecheck: for f in *.qnt; do quint typecheck "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for f in *.qnt; do quint test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.sweep: quint run pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=12 --max-samples=20000 && quint run crash_recovery.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=14 --max-samples=20000
scripts.verify: quint verify pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=6 && quint verify crash_recovery.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=12
scripts.findings: quint run pushout_exchange.qnt --invariant=ErasureComplete --max-steps=8 ; quint run erasure_dilemma.qnt --invariant=EnvelopeAvailable --max-steps=6 ; quint run crash_recovery_unsafe.qnt --invariant=NoCorruption --max-steps=6
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run sweep
